property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:/Users/Vishwa/.gemini/antigravity-ide/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Apache\maven\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\Vishwa\.local\bin;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\ProgramData\Vishwa\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;C:\Users\Vishwa\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: receiveGoods_updatesStock
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-26T01:46:07.653+05:30 INFO 24336 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.gradge.erp.purchase.PurchaseOrderReceiveIntegrationTest]: PurchaseOrderReceiveIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-26T01:46:07.673+05:30 INFO 24336 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.gradge.erp.ErpApplication for test class com.gradge.erp.purchase.PurchaseOrderReceiveIntegrationTest Hibernate: insert into tenants (api_limit_per_minute,custom_domain,industry,logo_url,name,storage_quota_mb,subdomain,theme_color,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into accounts (balance,code,created_at,created_by,is_deleted,name,tenant_id,type,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into accounts (balance,code,created_at,created_by,is_deleted,name,tenant_id,type,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into suppliers (address,contact_name,created_at,created_by,is_deleted,email,name,phone,tax_number,tenant_id,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into products (barcode,category_id,cost_price,created_at,created_by,is_deleted,name,quantity,reorder_level,selling_price,sku,tenant_id,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into purchase_orders (created_at,created_by,is_deleted,notes,po_number,status,supplier_id,tenant_id,total_amount,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into purchase_order_items (product_id,purchase_order_id,quantity,total_cost,unit_cost,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select po1_0.id,po1_0.created_at,po1_0.created_by,po1_0.is_deleted,po1_0.notes,po1_0.po_number,po1_0.status,po1_0.supplier_id,po1_0.tenant_id,po1_0.total_amount,po1_0.updated_at,po1_0.updated_by,po1_0.version from purchase_orders po1_0 where po1_0.id=? and po1_0.tenant_id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.barcode,p1_0.category_id,p1_0.cost_price,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.created_by,p1_0.is_deleted,p1_0.name,p1_0.quantity,p1_0.reorder_level,p1_0.selling_price,p1_0.sku,p1_0.tenant_id,p1_0.updated_at,p1_0.updated_by,p1_0.version from products p1_0 left join tenants t1_0 on t1_0.id=p1_0.tenant_id where p1_0.id=? and t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id,s1_0.batch_number,s1_0.expiry_date,s1_0.product_id,s1_0.quantity,s1_0.serial_number,s1_0.tenant_id,s1_0.warehouse_id from stock s1_0 left join products p1_0 on p1_0.id=s1_0.product_id left join tenants t1_0 on t1_0.id=s1_0.tenant_id where p1_0.id=? and s1_0.warehouse_id is null and t1_0.id=? Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.code,a1_0.created_at,a1_0.created_by,a1_0.is_deleted,a1_0.name,a1_0.tenant_id,a1_0.type,a1_0.updated_at,a1_0.updated_by,a1_0.version from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.code=? and a1_0.tenant_id=? and not(a1_0.is_deleted) Hibernate: insert into stock (batch_number,expiry_date,product_id,quantity,serial_number,tenant_id,warehouse_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into stock_movements (created_at,product_id,quantity,reference,tenant_id,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into goods_received_notes (created_at,created_by,is_deleted,grn_number,notes,product_id,purchase_order_id,quantity_received,received_date,stock_updated,tenant_id,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into journal_entries (created_at,created_by,is_deleted,description,entry_date,reference_number,tenant_id,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into transaction_lines (account_id,amount,created_at,created_by,is_debit,is_deleted,journal_entry_id,tenant_id,updated_at,updated_by,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: update accounts set balance=?,code=?,created_by=?,is_deleted=?,name=?,type=?,updated_at=?,updated_by=?,version=? where id=? and version=? Hibernate: update products set barcode=?,category_id=?,cost_price=?,created_by=?,is_deleted=?,name=?,quantity=?,reorder_level=?,selling_price=?,sku=?,updated_at=?,updated_by=?,version=? where id=? and version=? Hibernate: update purchase_orders set created_by=?,is_deleted=?,notes=?,po_number=?,status=?,supplier_id=?,total_amount=?,updated_at=?,updated_by=?,version=? where id=? and version=? Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.balance,a1_0.code,a1_0.created_at,a1_0.created_by,a1_0.is_deleted,a1_0.name,a1_0.tenant_id,a1_0.type,a1_0.updated_at,a1_0.updated_by,a1_0.version from accounts a1_0 where a1_0.code=? and a1_0.tenant_id=? and not(a1_0.is_deleted) Hibernate: select s1_0.id,s1_0.batch_number,s1_0.expiry_date,s1_0.product_id,s1_0.quantity,s1_0.serial_number,s1_0.tenant_id,s1_0.warehouse_id from stock s1_0 left join products p1_0 on p1_0.id=s1_0.product_id left join tenants t1_0 on t1_0.id=s1_0.tenant_id where p1_0.id=? and t1_0.id=?
